description: Machine-readable source of truth for the Glenmoor named-unit master batch workflow.

promptBlocks.globalPositive: moody medieval-fantasy tactical RPG art, painterly SRPG production concept, readable game-ready silhouettes, restrained material realism, overcast glen pass atmosphere, worn steel, weathered leather, muted natural palette, deliberate value grouping, strong silhouette separation, grounded production art, no modern elements, no UI, no text, no watermark
promptBlocks.globalNegative: anime splash art, glossy skin, chibi proportions, photobash collage, noisy background clutter, extreme fisheye perspective, floating props, extra limbs, duplicate weapons, cropped feet, unreadable silhouette, tiny face, giant portrait closeup, abstract art, color smear, rainbow glitch, logo, watermark, text, frame, border
promptBlocks.referenceDirective: single named unit concept plate on a wide neutral backdrop, full body fully visible, character centered, practical grounded costume design, clear empty space around the silhouette, designed to anchor portrait and sprite-sheet derivation
promptBlocks.portraitDirective: single character head-and-shoulders portrait illustration, centered face and upper collar, clear facial features, plain neutral backdrop, slight three-quarter view, readable at 32x32, no hands or weapons crossing the face, no abstract shapes, no giant glowing effects hiding the face
promptBlocks.atlasDirective: sprite-source contact sheet for the same character, many small full-body action poses arranged cleanly on a flat neutral sheet, same costume and weapon in every pose, four world directions north east south west, readable idle move attack cast hit defeat motion, no labels, no grid numbers, no environment scene, no giant portrait, no abstract blocks

classTones.vanguard: frontline vanguard silhouette, shield-first stance, practical armor layering, stable sword arm read
classTones.ranger: field ranger silhouette, longbow read, travel leathers and cloak, agile grounded stance
classTones.arcanist: battle arcanist silhouette, staff or focus-hand read, layered robes, controlled sigil glow
classTones.warden: defensive warden silhouette, broad shield massing, heavy grounded posture, fortified material language
classTones.skirmisher: mobile skirmisher silhouette, light armor, quick duelist posture, clean weapon read
classTones.cleric: support cleric silhouette, ritual sash or charm, calm posture, readable support-caster profile

units.identity: veteran frontline knight in a worn steel-blue surcoat over mail, with heater shield and straight longsword
units.palette: steel blue, parchment cream, weathered iron, leather brown
units.silhouette: broad shield, disciplined sword arm, square stance
units.atlasEmphasis: shield and sword silhouettes must remain stable across all actions

units.identity: lean field archer in a moss-green cloak and leather travel gear, carrying a yew longbow
units.palette: moss green, ash brown, faded tan, weathered bronze
units.silhouette: longbow arc, light cloak profile, alert archer stance
units.atlasEmphasis: bow shape, off-hand alignment, and face readability must survive all directions

units.identity: allied duelist in smoked leather with dark scarf, short curved blade, and agile travel kit
units.palette: smoked leather, charcoal, muted crimson, dark brass
units.silhouette: narrow duelist frame, scarf accent, quick blade-forward stance
units.atlasEmphasis: fast melee motion must stay readable without turning into motion blur clutter

units.identity: allied battlefield mage in slate and ember-trimmed robes with a brass focus rod
units.palette: slate gray, dim gold, ember orange, ash brown
units.silhouette: focus rod, layered robe hem, open off-hand casting read
units.atlasEmphasis: cast frames should stay controlled and readable rather than explosive or noisy

units.identity: allied shield warden in tempered steel with a broad tower shield and heavy mace
units.palette: tempered steel, slate, muted ivory, worn leather
units.silhouette: broad shield wall shape, heavy grounded frame, compact weapon read
units.atlasEmphasis: defensive stance and hit reactions should still show clear shield massing

units.identity: allied field cleric in linen and soft gold with prayer sash, ward charm, and short staff
units.palette: linen white, soft gold, desaturated blue-gray, warm parchment
units.silhouette: ritual sash, compact staff, centered support-caster profile
units.atlasEmphasis: support and cast motions must remain distinct from arcanist attack motions

units.identity: enemy brigand captain in battered plate scraps with a chipped heater shield and rough broadsword
units.palette: muddy iron, oxblood cloth, worn black leather, dirty brass
units.silhouette: ragged shield edge, heavy sword profile, aggressive stance
units.atlasEmphasis: enemy armor silhouette must stay distinct from Rowan while preserving the same class readability

units.identity: enemy huntmaster in dark green and fur-trimmed leathers with a hunting bow and trophy cords
units.palette: dark pine, bark brown, weathered bone, blackened bronze
units.silhouette: furred shoulder line, hunting bow, stern field posture
units.atlasEmphasis: enemy ranger should read harsher and more rugged than Elira without losing bow clarity

units.identity: hostile ember-sigil caster in charred burgundy and soot-black layered robes with hooked staff
units.palette: charred burgundy, soot black, dim gold, ember orange
units.silhouette: hooked staff, layered robe hem, hostile casting hand read
units.atlasEmphasis: cast and hit frames must preserve face and hand readability under magical glow

units.identity: enemy shieldbearer in slab armor with iron-rimmed wall shield and blunt mace
units.palette: dull iron, smoke gray, dirty ivory, leather black
units.silhouette: massive shield block, compact head silhouette, heavy mace read
units.atlasEmphasis: defeat frames should keep the huge shield readable instead of collapsing into clutter

units.identity: enemy cutpurse in dark travel leathers with knife-forward duelist stance and narrow scarf
units.palette: charcoal, muted plum, dirty red, smoke leather
units.silhouette: knife-forward torso twist, slim frame, scarf accent
units.atlasEmphasis: attack frames should look quick and nasty without losing full-body readability

units.identity: enemy zealot in tattered ritual cloth with censer, hymn scroll, and ward-marked charm
units.palette: dirty ivory, rust red, soot gray, dim brass
units.silhouette: scroll hand, swinging censer, narrow ritual profile
units.atlasEmphasis: cleric support identity should remain clear even with enemy zealot styling

units.identity: enemy marsh ambusher in reed-green cloak with recurved bow and damp river gear
units.palette: reed green, wet brown, slate gray, dull iron
units.silhouette: narrow bow read, marsh cloak, ambush-ready stance
units.atlasEmphasis: move and attack frames should keep the bow and cloak readable from all directions

units.identity: enemy highway raider in patched leathers with hooked axe and looted belt gear
units.palette: dust brown, charcoal, faded rust, tarnished steel
units.silhouette: hooked axe head, layered belts, aggressive lean
units.atlasEmphasis: weapon hook and body lean must stay recognizable across all four directions
